formulas.label: e0030
formulas.latex: q_{i} = exp \left(- n \times \frac{f \left(x_{i}\right) - f \left(x_{\mathit{best}}\right)}{\sum_{j = 1}^{\mathit{popsize}} \left(f \left(x_{j}\right) - f \left(x_{\mathit{best}}\right)\right)}\right) , \forall i = 1 , 2 , \ldots , \mathit{popsize}

formulas.label: e0035
formulas.latex: F_{i} = \left\{\begin{matrix} \sum_{j \neq i}^{\mathit{popsize}} \left(x_{j} - x_{i}\right) \frac{q_{j} \times q_{i}}{\left\|x_{j} - x_{i}\right\|^{2}} ; & f \left(x_{j}\right) < f \left(x_{i}\right) \\ \sum_{j \neq i}^{\mathit{popsize}} \left(x_{j} - x_{i}\right) \frac{q_{j} \times q_{i}}{\left\|x_{j} - x_{i}\right\|^{2}} ; & f \left(x_{j}\right) \geq f \left(x_{i}\right) \end{matrix}\right

formulas.label: e0040
formulas.latex: \left\{\begin{matrix} x_{\mathit{ik}} = x_{\mathit{ik}} + \mathit{Random} \left(0 , 1\right) \times F_{\mathit{ik}} \left(1 - x_{\mathit{ik}}\right) ; & F_{\mathit{ik}} > 0 \\ x_{\mathit{ik}} = x_{\mathit{ik}} + \mathit{Random} \left(0 , 1\right) \times F_{\mathit{ik}} \left(x_{\mathit{ik}}\right) ; & F_{\mathit{ik}} \leq 0 \end{matrix}\right
